name: setting-up-website
notes: Real user test case. 22 tabs from a sweep run on 2026-05-18 15:24. User reported 5 clear false positives (Cloudflare DNS, Resend, Supabase, Railway, Claude Code article). Used to baseline Qwen-4B accuracy and measure deltas as we change threshold / batch size / prompt / model.
intent: Doing: Going to be working on setting up a website so any site related to buying domains, setting up email, software development in general. terminal … any IDE claude…. Scope: what's not allowed is any distraction website
